<p class="key-answer" data-question="Zanubrutinib 有什麼相關新聞？">

</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Zanubrutinib 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Brukinsa&nbsp;as monotherapy is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with Waldenström’s macroglobulinaemia (WM) who have received at least one prior therapy, or in first line treatment for...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>myeloid leukemia（99.7%）</li>
<li>vertebral anomalies and variable endocrine and T-cell dysfunction（99.4%）</li>
<li>ganglioneuroblastoma (disease)（99.4%）</li>
<li>retroperitoneal neoplasm（99.3%）</li>
<li>Ewing sarcoma（99.3%）</li>
<li>neuroblastoma（99.2%）</li>
<li>chronic myelogenous leukemia, BCR-ABL1 positive（98.6%）</li>
<li>lymphosarcoma（98.1%）</li>
<li>blast phase chronic myelogenous leukemia, BCR-ABL1 positive（98.1%）</li>
<li>lymphoma, non-Hodgkin, familial（98.0%）</li>
<li>acute lymphoblastic/lymphocytic leukemia（97.9%）</li>
<li>mantle cell lymphoma（97.7%）</li>
<li>chronic lymphocytic leukemia/small lymphocytic lymphoma with immunoglobulin heavy chain variable-region gene somatic hypermutation（97.7%）</li>
<li>pregerminal center chronic lymphocytic leukemia/small lymphocytic lymphoma（97.7%）</li>
<li>lymph node cancer（97.4%）</li>
<li>colon adenocarcinoma（97.3%）</li>
<li>B-cell neoplasm（97.0%）</li>
<li>plasmacytoma（96.9%）</li>
<li>primary cutaneous T-cell non-Hodgkin lymphoma（96.7%）</li>
<li>primary organ-specific lymphoma（96.6%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
